Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.plot

Class ContinuousModelFunction

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.plot.ContinuousModelFunction
public class ContinuousModelFunction extends Object
This class represents a continuous model function, the synthetic ValidObservations resulting from the model and any context required to apply it such as coordinate source.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit)
    Constructor: defaults to JD coordinate source and no (0) zero point.
    ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit, double zeroPoint)
    Constructor: defaults to JD coordinate source.
    ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit, double zeroPoint, ICoordSource coordSrc)

  • Constructor Details

    • ContinuousModelFunction

      public ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit, double zeroPoint, ICoordSource coordSrc)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      function - The univariate real function.
      fit - The synthetic observations resulting from the fit.
      zeroPoint - The zero point to be subtracted from applications of the function, i.e. calls to UnivariateRealFunction.value().
      coordSrc - The coordinate source (JD, phase).

    • ContinuousModelFunction

      public ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit, double zeroPoint)
      Constructor: defaults to JD coordinate source.
      Parameters:
      function - The univariate real function.
      fit - The synthetic observations resulting from the fit.
      zeroPoint - The zero point to be subtracted from applications of the function, i.e. calls to UnivariateRealFunction.value().

    • ContinuousModelFunction

      public ContinuousModelFunction(org.apache.commons.math.analysis.UnivariateRealFunction function, List<ValidObservation> fit)
      Constructor: defaults to JD coordinate source and no (0) zero point.
      Parameters:
      function - The univariate real function.
      fit - The synthetic observations resulting from the fit.
